__doc__: SOURCE of truth for the Repos of Interest catalog (the /craft workspace/tools page). Hand-authored: one entry per repository worth returning to. The generator scripts/generate-repos-data.js reads THIS file, validates it, and emits the gitignored src/components/RepoCatalog/repos-data.json that <RepoCatalog> renders (grouped by tag). Edit HERE, then run 'make generate-assets' (or a build regenerates it). Each entry: name, url, blurb, tags[]. Tags are free-form but SHOULD come from the vocabulary below so the catalog groups cleanly.

__tags__.tool: A tool I use or would reach for: something that does a job.
__tags__.relevant: Relevant to my work / worth knowing about, not necessarily something I use.
__tags__.reference: A reference implementation or example I return to.

repos.name: nano-graphrag
repos.blurb: A small, hackable implementation of GraphRAG: retrieval-augmented generation over a knowledge graph.

repos.name: keploy
repos.blurb: A developer-centric API and integration testing tool that auto-generates tests and data-mocks faster than writing unit tests.
